cards.title: Build CLI
cards.description: Terminal CLI for managing projects, columns, and cards via the API

cards.title: Fix dead code in evaluator.py
cards.description: Lines 942-1153 in evaluator.py are unreachable — a full duplicate of _build_overall_summary_table appears after an early return on line 941. Delete the duplicate block.

cards.title: Wire up --yes / -y CLI flag
cards.description: The execute subparser never adds the --yes/-y argument (cli.py uses getattr(args, 'yes', False) as a silent fallback). Add run_parser.add_argument('--yes', '-y', ...) so the documented flag actually works.

cards.title: Make judge LLM call async
cards.description: Judge.grade() calls self.llm.invoke() (blocking) while the evaluator runs inside asyncio.gather. Switch to ainvoke and make grade an async method so it doesn't block the event loop during concurrent model runs.

cards.title: Honour JudgeConfig.system_prompt
cards.description: JudgeConfig has a system_prompt field but Judge.__init__ never passes it to the LLM. Wire it up so users can customise the judge's system prompt from the config file.

cards.title: Gitignore eval output files
cards.description: The repo root is cluttered with eval_*.json and eval_*.log artefacts. Add patterns to .gitignore so run outputs aren't accidentally committed.

cards.title: Add --output-dir CLI flag to execute
cards.description: EvalConfig has an output_dir field but there's no way to set it from the CLI without editing the JSON. Add --output-dir to the execute subparser and pass it through to the evaluator.

cards.title: Add CI test workflow
cards.description: publish.yml only handles PyPI publishing; there's no workflow that runs the unit-test suite on PRs. Add a separate test.yml that runs uv run pytest on push/pull_request.

cards.title: Add arbiter compare command
cards.description: Add a CLI subcommand (arbiter compare a.json b.json) that diffs two eval result files side-by-side — showing per-model pass-rate deltas, latency changes, and cost differences.

cards.title: Blog post automations
cards.description: Automate the blog post generation workflow: transcript processing, section writing, image generation, and publishing pipeline.
